identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Modal titles

body.usage: General text, Form labels, Table data

mono.usage: Document IDs, Audit Logs, Metadata keys

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on sidebar/header for 'paper' feel
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Hovering a table row adds a 2px accent-colored border on the left edge

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but doubled for section gaps (p-8, p-12)

buttons.style: Sharp edges or pill-shaped. Primary: Solid Slate-900. Secondary: White with Border.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow. White background.

inputs.style: Flat, 1px border, bg-transparent. Focus: Ring-1 Ring-Accent

tables.style: Dense, 1px border-b separators. Header: Uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs, text-secondary.

modals.style: Backdrop blur-sm. Modal: White, sharp corners, 1px border.

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login page with 50% white overlay

empty_state_docs.usage: Center of dashboard when no documents exist

instructions_to_main_agent: TAILWIND CONFIG: Update font families in tailwind.config.js to match the typography section.
THEME SETUP: Implement the 'Swiss Archival' color palette in index.css CSS variables.
LAYOUT: Build a 'DashboardLayout' component with a fixed sidebar and scrollable main area.
TABLES: Use Shadcn Table component but strip the rounded corners and add the 'hover:border-l-2' interaction.
FORMS: Use React Hook Form + Zod + Shadcn Form components.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, rows).
universal_guidelines: Do not center-align main content; use left alignment for readability.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
